marketwide.label: Marketwide ICC
marketwide.note: All U.S. market and S&P 500 aggregate ICC series.

value.label: Value premium ICC
value.note: Value, growth, and implied value premium series built from firm-level ICC snapshots.

industry.label: Industry ICC
industry.note: Industry-level ICC series aggregated from the all-market firm-level ICC panel.

indices.label: Index ICC
indices.note: Index-level ICC series aggregated from available index constituent snapshots.

etf.label: ETF ICC
etf.note: ETF ICC series from archived ETF holdings calculations where available. History starts when archiving begins.

country.label: Country / Region Level ICC
country.note: Country / Region Level ICC series from archived ADR composite calculations where available. History starts when archiving begins.
